summary: Weekly Plan Multi-Selection & PDF Download Feature Testing - All features working correctly. Tested checkboxes, select all, combined PDF download, and expanded modal sizes.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - minor accessibility warning

passed_tests: Login flow works correctly
Weekly Plan page loads at /weekly-plan
Create Plan button (data-testid='create-plan-btn') works
Create Plan modal opens with title 'Crear Plan Semanal'
Create Plan modal is wide (w-[1400px]) - showing all 14 columns
Plan creation works - toast 'Plan creado correctamente' shown
Individual plan checkbox appears next to each plan
Checkbox has data-testid='select-plan-{planId}' attribute
Clicking individual checkbox selects/deselects plan
'Seleccionar todos' checkbox appears when plans exist
Select All checkbox (data-testid='select-all-plans') works
Clicking Select All selects all plans
Clicking Select All again deselects all plans
'Descargar X plan(es) en PDF' button appears when plans selected
Button shows correct count (1 plan(es), 2 plan(es), etc.)
Download button hidden when no plans selected
Combined PDF download works - toast 'PDF generado con 2 plan(es)'
Selections cleared after PDF download
Edit Plan button works
Edit Plan modal opens with title 'Editar Plan Semanal'
Edit Plan modal is wide (1350px actual, target w-[1400px])
Edit modal shows all 14 columns: Empleado, Posición, Crew, Entrada, Proyecto, Lun-Dom, Look Ahead

multiple_selection.individual_checkboxes: WORKING - Checkbox appears next to each plan with data-testid
multiple_selection.select_all_checkbox: WORKING - Located in card header, toggles all plans
multiple_selection.download_button_visibility: WORKING - Shows only when plans selected, shows count
multiple_selection.deselection: WORKING - Can deselect individual or all plans

combined_pdf_download.button_appearance: WORKING - Blue button 'Descargar X plan(es) en PDF'
combined_pdf_download.pdf_generation: WORKING - jsPDF generates combined PDF with all selected plans
combined_pdf_download.success_toast: WORKING - Shows 'PDF generado con X plan(es)'

expanded_modals.edit_modal: WORKING - DialogContent uses same expanded size
expanded_modals.7_day_table: WORKING - All columns visible: Employee, Position, Crew, Entry, Project, Mon-Sun, Look Ahead

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test plans: 'TEST Plan Semanal - Test Selection' and 'TEST Plan Semanal 2 - Multiple Selection Test'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Plan multi-selection and combined PDF download features fully tested and working. Both Create and Edit modals are expanded to w-[1400px]. Selection checkboxes have data-testid attributes for testing. The generateCombinedPDF function uses jsPDF with autoTable to create combined PDFs.
